name: Pump Up
description: Request human approvals/elicitations from Pump Up and resume agent work when a decision arrives.

baseUrl.description: Pump Up agent API base URL

apiKey.description: Pump Up agent API key — literal string or SecretRef; falls back to PUMPUP_API_KEY env

ownerSessionKey.description: Stable sessionKey that owns all Pump Up TaskFlows

maxConcurrentResumes.description: Max concurrent resume runs per poll tick (default 4)
